mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, u.nickname AS userNickname, u.credit_score AS userCredit FROM car c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id
AND c.status = #{status}
AND (c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.goods_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE car SET status = 5, closed_at = NOW() WHERE status = 0 AND deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline < #{now}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, u.nickname AS userNickname, u.credit_score AS userCredit FROM car c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id
AND c.status = #{car.status}
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{car.title}, '%')
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
